case_title: NICK SINGH ET AL VS. 399 FREMONT, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY SINGH, NICK JOERIN, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGH, NICK AS TO DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-24-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED.D. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGH, NICK JOERIN, ANGELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 399 FREMONT, LLC
